check_content_excerpt:
Verify the operating system is configured to prohibit the use or connection of unauthorized hardware components.

If the operating system is using undocumented or unapproved hardware, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the operating system to prohibit the use or connection of unauthorized hardware components. Remove any hardware that is not documented or not approved by the information system security officer (ISSO) or information system security manager (ISSM).
title: Windows Server 2025 must prohibit the use or connection of unauthorized hardware components.
